texts.label: text
texts.orig: Booking will only be confirmed on receipt of 30% deposit.  Full balance of payment is required 60 days prior to clients' arrival. A confirmation voucher will only be issued on receipt of 100% payment.  La Pieve Limited may at its discretion not honor a booking if payment has not been recived on the payment schedule.
texts.text: Booking will only be confirmed on receipt of 30% deposit.  Full balance of payment is required 60 days prior to clients' arrival. A confirmation voucher will only be issued on receipt of 100% payment.  La Pieve Limited may at its discretion not honor a booking if payment has not been recived on the payment schedule.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Accomodation cancelled or reduced in number between 65 days & 40 days -30% total cost payable Accomodation cancelled or reduced in number between 39 days and 30 days -50% total cost payable Accomodation cancelled or reduced in number between 29 days & no show -100% total cost payable 30% nonrefundable deposit must be made to confirm booking
texts.text: Accomodation cancelled or reduced in number between 65 days & 40 days -30% total cost payable Accomodation cancelled or reduced in number between 39 days and 30 days -50% total cost payable Accomodation cancelled or reduced in number between 29 days & no show -100% total cost payable 30% nonrefundable deposit must be made to confirm booking
